query: UPDATE location SET instance_id = $1, name = $2, address = $3, pubkey = $4, endpoint = $5, allowed_ips = $6, dns = $7, network_id = $8, route_all_traffic = $9, keepalive_interval = $10, location_mfa_mode = $11, service_location_mode = $12, mfa_method = $13, posture_check_required = $14 WHERE id = $15
